description: Durable field-menu override for the accepted Package 1 split. Prevents regenerators from collapsing West Climb and Harrison Hollow into one long Harrison-start route.

overrides.reason: Accepted field-menu split: two realistic parked-start outings fit real door-to-door windows better than the collapsed 299-minute route.
